lessons.title: What is a Data Frame?
lessons.description: Learn about data frames, R's version of a spreadsheet or SQL table.

lessons.title: Creating Data Frames
lessons.description: Create data frames from vectors using data.frame(). Understand row names and column names.

lessons.title: Inspecting Data Frames
lessons.description: Use functions like head(), tail(), str(), summary(), dim(), names() to explore data frames.

lessons.title: Accessing Data Frame Elements
lessons.description: Extract columns, rows, and cells using [, $, [[]], and logical subsetting.

lessons.title: Modifying Data Frames
lessons.description: Add, remove, and rename columns; modify values; handle missing data.

lessons.title: Filtering Rows and Using subset()
lessons.description: Select rows based on conditions with logical vectors and the subset() function.
